case_title: CATES BRUCE VS STANFIELD ROY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT STANFIELD ROY GRAY BEAULAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CATES BRUCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CATES BRUCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANFIELD ROY GRAY BEAULAH $311.25 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $319.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO CLERK/DEPT.8.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $311.25 FILED BY CATES BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT STANFIELD ROY GRAY BEAULAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $311.25 FILED BY STANFIELD ROY GRAY BEAULAH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CATES BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF CATES BRUCE
